title: Add alignment drift regression fixtures
summary: Create regression fixtures for vertical drift, horizontal drift, dogfood/source confusion, stale generated output, missing build traceability, missing audit evidence, and invalid publication proof.

goal.outcome: Future refactors cannot silently reintroduce known drift classes because fixtures make them fail deterministically.
acceptance: Fixtures cover vertical drift, horizontal drift, dogfood/source confusion, stale generated output, missing accepted build, missing audit evidence, and invalid publication proof.
Tests assert each fixture fails with a specific issue kind or reconciliation item.
Clean fixture passes full audit/graph checks.
Regression suite is documented as required for architecture/gateway changes.
non_goals: Do not make fixtures depend on external network or remote GitHub state.

delta.desired: Known drift classes are codified as failing fixtures.
delta.current: Drift was discovered through manual broad audit, not regression fixtures.
delta.closure: Regression tests cover drift classes and pass on clean repo.
